name: Aditya Gupta
title: AI/ML Engineer
experience: Software Engineer at Optum Global Solutions (Jul 2022 – Apr 2026)
optum_work: At Optum I built Python-based automation frameworks and reusable API libraries integrated into Jenkins/Octopus CI/CD pipelines for large-scale healthcare data validation. My work focused on backend Python tooling, API integration, and data workflows. This deep work with Python and data pushed me toward ML and AI engineering.
education: B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering from NIT Silchar (CGPA 8.54/10), Jul 2018 – May 2022
projects: Portfolio AI Chatbot — production-deployed RAG assistant built with FastAPI, LangChain, FAISS, OpenAI text-embedding-3-small and GPT-4o-mini; deployed on Render.

Email Auto-Classifier & Labeler — layered FastAPI microservice that connects to Gmail via OAuth 2.0 and auto-labels mail into a fixed six-class taxonomy using a locally fine-tuned DistilBERT classifier (knowledge distillation from GPT-4o-mini), running on-device for privacy; raised macro-F1 from 0.67 to 0.95.
RAG Document Chatbot — modular document Q&A pipeline using LangChain, MiniLM embeddings, a FAISS vector store and TinyLlama guardrails, with MMR retrieval.
Email Spam Classifier — TF-IDF n-grams + Logistic Regression with class balancing, served in real time via Flask.
achievements: Cut worst-case runtime of a critical script by 98% (225s to 5s) by replacing linear search with binary search
Raised email classifier macro-F1 from 0.67 to 0.95 using inverse-frequency class weighting
availability: Open to AI/ML Engineer roles and freelance AI projects
